name: Raspberry Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Gradually stir milk into milk powder until smooth.
3. Stir in egg substitute, 1/3 cup sugar, and vanilla extract.
4. Place 5 raspberries in the bottom of each of six 6-ounce custard cups.
5. Pour the custard mixture over the raspberries in each cup.
6. Fill a baking pan with hot water to a depth of about 1 inch.
7. Bake in the oven filled with hot water for about 35 minutes, or until the custard is set.
8. Chill thoroughly.
9. Sprinkle half a teaspoon of sugar over the top of each chilled custard.
10. Place the cups on a baking sheet and broil 4 inches from the heat source until the sugar is caramelized.
Per serving: 141 calories, 127 milligrams sodium, 2 milligrams cholesterol, 2 grams fat, 13% of calories from fat, 25 grams carbohydrates, 7 grams protein.
